response.justification: Bogdan has extensive experience in software development across multiple languages and domains, but his background is heavily skewed toward web, mobile, and scripting languages (TypeScript, Node.js, JavaScript, Dlang, Python) rather than C++ and industrial automation. While he has some C++ experience (e.g., National Instruments, LabWindows/CVI), it is limited and not recent. His resume lacks evidence of secure development lifecycle (SDL) practices, IEC 62443 compliance, or industrial cybersecurity expertise, which are critical for this role. His strengths in architecture, agile methodologies, and cross-functional collaboration are valuable but do not outweigh the gaps in core technical competencies.
strengths: Strong problem-solving and analytical skills with a focus on software craftsmanship (e.g., TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Extensive experience in cross-functional collaboration and mentorship across diverse teams
Proven ability to design and deliver scalable, high-performance solutions (e.g., real-time metadata handling, micro-services infrastructure)
concerns: Lacks recent and substantial C++ experience required for the role (limited to early career projects)

key_factors.factor: Experience with industrial automation protocols (e.g., Modbus, OPC UA)
